programme.title: TVP@TTV Sains Tahun 1 Ep02
programme.desc: Tajuk ini membincangkan mengenai magnet , kegunaannya dalam kehidupan kita dan menerangkan pelbagai bentuk magnet seperti magnet bar, silinder, bentuk U, ladam, butang dan cincin.

programme.title: TVP@TTV Sains Tahun 5 Ep02
programme.desc: Tajuk ini membincangkan mengenai tiga bentuk jirim iaitu pepejal, cecair dan gas., ciri-ciri dan perbezaan tiga keadaan jirim dan proses perubahan jirim yang terdapat pada air

programme.title: TVP@TTV Pend. Islam Ting. 1 Ep02
programme.desc: Topik ini menerangkan tentang pengertian jahiliah. Diperincikan hal kejahilan dalam bidang akidah dan akhlak serta pelbagai pegangan akidah yang dianuti oleh masyarakat jahiliyah. Kejahilan masyarakat Arab ini masih wujud dan ada di antaranya masih diamalkan sehingga sekarang. Murid murid dikehendaki meninggalkan akhlak buruk yang terdapat dalam masyarakat sekarang yang mirip kejahilan masyarakat

programme.title: Bear's Mission With Anthony Joshua
programme.desc: Adventurer Bear Grylls teaches the unified world heavyweight champion some alternative survival skills.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: Similar to any good Cajun dish, a successful duck camp requires preparation. The last day on dry land is filled with essential stops to get ready for 5 days on the Bayou. Whether making sure we have the right ingredients for our favorite meals, or getting the boats brushed up and ready for action, the day before can be just as important as the day of.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: Tune in as Jean-Paul and the crew share their first day full day at duck camp with a morning in the duck blind and catfish on the jug line. At the end of the day they put their Cajun grocery goods together for an epic duck camp meal.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation EP-7
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela's” in 1961, he was unaware it would become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it's only fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela, on this high-impact journey of discovery, as he uncovers some lesser-known facts about conservation. In particular, the role which hunting and the utilization of wildlife

programme.desc: Sara lists her top 5 experiences and we see some new recipes ala Sara that she created inspired by Australia. From an eccentric pizza entrepreneur to a game of golf with kangaroos -these are Sara's favorites.

programme.title: Ultimate Freedive
programme.desc: World champion freediver Marina Kazankova is on a mission, to free dive the Great Barrier Reef.Capable of holding her breath for 7-minutes at a time, Marina travels to the iconic reef, swimming with turtles and giant groper, diving on ship wrecks and through awesome caves, all on a single breath of air.Capturing each challenge in glorious 4K, this series brings you face to face with the very best

programme.title: Abhinandana (TG) Ep336
programme.desc: Despite growing apart, Rahul & Abhisarika have loved each other since childhood. By a twist of events, Abhisarika changes her looks to evade a forced marriage & later becomes engaged to Rahul.

programme.title: Amme Mookambike (ML) Ep50
programme.desc: Karthika faces numerous challenges in her life. As she navigates these hardships, she finds solace and strength in the goddess Mookambika, who eventually intervenes to protect her and her family

programme.title: Nagamani (TG) Ep151
programme.desc: Tale of love between the shape-shifting naag - naagin and the never-ending greed of the evil witch seeking immortality by acquiring the life-giving jewel possessed by the naagin.

programme.title: Anju Sundarikal (ML) Ep11
programme.desc: Five friends move into a hostel ruled by a short-tempered warden, unaware of its sinister past; when they hide a charming stranger, comic chaos soon turns eerie.

programme.title: Kanyadanam (ML) Ep35
programme.desc: A father lives happily with his five daughters who adore him but he is worried about finding the right match for all of them. As new alliances come, their lives slowly begin to change.

programme.title: Sathya (TG) Ep07
programme.desc: Sathya values love and compassion above all, while Chamundeswari is driven by wealth and ego. But when fate brings them together, how far will Sathya go to protect her values and her family?

programme.title: Hridayam (ML) Ep368
programme.desc: In an unhappy marriage Dr.Niranjan's sole joy is his daughter Shruthi. While Sudhi & Devika believe they've found their soulmate in each other. But fate places them in a complex web of relationships.

programme.title: Premapooja (ML) Ep279
programme.desc: Aadi secretly loves his classmate, Pooja. Unbeknownst to him, she is in a passionate relationship with Shanu, which ends in tragedy. Aadi ultimately steps in to save Pooja during a desperate moment.

programme.title: Constable Manju (TG) Ep361
programme.desc: Timid, yet street-smart Manju and an unruly Giri couldn't be more different from each other. Despite their differences, they are bound by fate through an unavoidable marriage.

programme.title: Sravana Sandhya (TG) Ep175
programme.desc: Sravani wants to find a suitable partner for her sister Sandhya, who aspires to live a luxurious lifestyle. Meanwhile, love blossoms between Sravani and Akshay.

programme.title: Sri Hari Kalyanam (TG) Ep60
programme.desc: Lakshmi, the pillar of her family, marries Srihari with a promise to continue supporting her loved ones; their marriage soon faces challenges that test their unity and happiness.

programme.title: Koyil Kaalai
programme.desc: Upili, a dedicated person towards serving the village temple, marries Arasaee who plans to embarrass him while joining hands with Sundaralingam, a fraudster.

programme.title: Swayamvarappanthal (ML) Ep218
programme.desc: Nandini, a stunning village girl, works tirelessly out of deep devotion to her family. Meanwhile, fuelled by lingering resentment, Surya despises his mother & wilfully bonds with Nandini causing strife.

programme.title: Moodu Mullu (TG) Ep361

The downside to it is that it will result in its user's death after twenty-four hours.

programme.title: The Story of the Death
programme.desc: Border patrol Police Lieutenant Aod, sends his subordinates to bust a drug trafficking operation. Due to serving on the force for many years, he was away from his parents for a long time. Therefore, he requested to be transferred back to Bangkok to care for his parents. Many years later, his parents die from disease. Aod continues to live alone at home and does not associate with anyone.

programme.title: Exorcism : Haunted Child

programme.desc: Yasser sanggup mencederakan orang lain demi mencari kebenaran. Dahlia cuba merungkai misteri yang dihadapi Yasser.

programme.title: Gempak Most Wanted Bytes 2026 Ep62
programme.desc: Saksikan Gempak Most Wanted setiap Rabu jam 11 malam di Astro Ria.

programme.title: Menantu Atau Isteri Untuk Abah
programme.desc: Mail si ayah dan Talib si anak, jatuh cinta dengan gadis yang sama iaitu, Mastura. Siapakah bakal bersanding dengan si gadis pada hari raya nanti?

programme.title: The Maid Ep08
programme.desc: Mengisahkan Suhana, Nadia, Fika dan Elisa yang merupakan isteri kepada seorang jutawan terkenal, Jay. Hubungan keempat-empat isteri ini pada luarannya nampak baik tetapi sebenarnya mereka sering bermusuhan

programme.title: Casa Impiana Ep02

programme.title: Dr. Pontianak Ep06

programme.title: Rumah Tanpa Luka Ep15
